title: レースとグルメで満腹に

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've brought Oguri Cap to observe a race as part
of her training.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The track's shaped like a rice ball... How
fascinating.
choice_data_list: You can buy a real rice ball inside, you know.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I've heard the Nakayama Racecourse has a great
selection of food. I can't wait to see for myself.
choice_data_list:
Let's take a look around the shops until the race
starts.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap's eyes twinkle with excitement as we
walk through the concessions area.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The race will start soon. Do you think we have
time to look at a few more?
choice_data_list:
We should go now to make sure we get a good
spot.
Let's enjoy the race and the food!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But... All right. I guess the race is the reason we're here, after all.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
There's still food left to see... but it's fine. Let's
head to the stands.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Would you look at that! Here's Akemichi King,
coming up from behind!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Akemi... "Chicken"?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Noppo Tetora is hot on her tail!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: No... "po-ta-to"?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Chicken... Potato... Deep-fried... Piping hot...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Mmrgh... Don't worry, it's nothing. Let's just watch
the race.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Chicken... Potato... It's difficult to discount either
racer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Oguri Cap is clearly struggling with
some ordeal, I do as she says and remain silent by
her side.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The race is almost over. Will the winner be
Chicken... or Potato?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Akemichi King clinches the victory! Akemichi
Kiiiiing!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, so Chicken won! Just as I predicted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Oguri Cap managed to resist the
gastronomic temptation and focus on the race.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Potato ran amazingly, too. I could learn a few
things from—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...I'm hungry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I treat Oguri Cap to dinner for watching the race
so attentively.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
There are still a few places I have my eye on. Let's
check out as many as we can before the race
starts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go around the concession stands with Oguri
Cap. She's so lively, it's like she's a whole new
person.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The race is just starting. All right, let's get ready
to focus!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yes. My mind is sharper now that I have a full
stomach.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Now I can predict what the racer in second place
will do, or who will break out from the rear...
Things like that.
choice_data_list: Who do you think is going to win?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Good question. Judging by the current situation...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us discuss our predictions for the
outcomes of the races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, after the final race...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I was right again... You see, she was sticking to
the outer side of the track the whole time.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It looks easier to run on the outside on this
course, so I figured she'd have the advantage.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I should do pretty well when I get to race
here.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I think I'll make you, the folks back home, and all
my fans proud.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That's why I have to keep putting my all into my...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Trai...ning... Yaaawn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may have put too much energy into analysis
after eating. She seems to be on the verge of a
food coma.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We leave the stands, dreaming of the day when
the crowd will all be chanting Oguri Cap's name.
